info.name: Web Sankul API — v2 Additions
info.description:
Companion collection covering modules added in the v2 build:

**Customer:** promocodes, ebooks, orders, cms, inquiry/contact, notifications, dashboard, offline, wishlist, webhook, tracking, save-answers

**Admin:** promocode, subscriptions & reports, cms, inquiry/departments, notifications, offline, promoters, dashboard, activity-tracking

**Educator portal** (separate auth domain)

**Promoter portal** (separate auth domain)

Import alongside the main Web Sankul API collection. Uses the same `{{URL}}` and `{{accessToken}}` variables.

item.name: Customer APIs — Additions
item.description: New customer endpoints added in v2.

item.name: Admin APIs — Additions
item.description: New admin endpoints added in v2.

exec: const j = pm.response.json(); if (j?.data?._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('promoter_id', j.data._id);

item.name: Educator APIs
item.description: Separate auth domain. Login via email + password.

exec: const j = pm.response.json(); if (j?.data?.accessToken) { pm.collectionVariables.set('educatorAccessToken', j.data.accessToken); pm.collectionVariables.set('educatorRefreshToken', j.data.refreshToken); }

item.name: Promoter APIs
item.description: Separate auth domain. Login via email + password.

exec: const j = pm.response.json(); if (j?.data?.accessToken) { pm.collectionVariables.set('promoterAccessToken', j.data.accessToken); pm.collectionVariables.set('promoterRefreshToken', j.data.refreshToken); }
